resume_text: Skilled in Python and SQL. Applied machine learning for predictive modeling and data analysis.
Built responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Learning React for frontend development.
Experienced with Java and Kotlin. Designed Android apps using Android Studio and XML layouts.
Worked on NLP projects with TensorFlow and deep learning. Proficient in Python.
Expert in SQL and MySQL. Worked on Oracle databases with focus on database design and optimization.
Hands-on with AWS deployment. Containerized apps using Docker and Kubernetes. Familiar with Terraform.
Conducted penetration testing and managed network security with firewalls. Worked with SIEM tools.
Proficient in Excel and SQL. Created dashboards for data visualization. Skilled in requirements gathering.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins. Automated deployment with Docker. Strong Linux skills.
Developed UI using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Built components with React.
Created REST APIs using Node.js and Express. Integrated with MongoDB for data storage.
Built end-to-end applications using React for frontend and Node.js with MongoDB for backend.
Strong knowledge of Data Structures and Algorithms. Implemented projects in Java and C++.
Worked with Linux servers, automated tasks using Bash scripting, and resolved system issues.
Executed manual and automated testing using Selenium. Documented defects in JIRA.
Developed machine learning models using Scikit-learn and TensorFlow. Focused on data preprocessing.
Built ETL pipelines using Spark and Hadoop. Automated data workflows with Python.
Configured Cisco routers and switches. Established VPN connections and monitored traffic.
Provided IT support for hardware and networking issues. Troubleshot Windows systems.
Managed product lifecycle, created roadmaps, and worked with stakeholders in agile environments.
Designed user interfaces and wireframes using Figma and Adobe XD. Created interactive prototypes.
Worked on branding projects using Photoshop and Illustrator. Delivered creative designs.
Led project teams, planned project execution, and managed risks with PMP methodologies.
Developed smart contracts using Solidity on Ethereum. Integrated blockchain with Web3.js.
Developed 2D and 3D games using Unity and C#. Implemented game physics and mechanics.
Programmed Arduino microcontrollers using C. Built IoT-based embedded systems.
Designed electrical circuits and PCB layouts. Used MATLAB for simulations.
Designed mechanical components with SolidWorks. Knowledgeable in thermodynamics.
Created building designs in AutoCAD. Conducted structural analysis and cost estimation.
Analyzed datasets using SQL and Excel. Built dashboards in Tableau for visualization.
Improved processes with Lean Six Sigma. Managed supply chain operations efficiently.
Wrote SEO-friendly articles. Strong in copywriting and content research.
Managed SEO campaigns and ran Google Ads. Optimized social media marketing.
Handled recruitment drives, payroll management, and employee engagement programs.
Created financial models and performed forecasting. Skilled in company valuation.
Conducted scientific research using MATLAB and Python. Applied advanced statistics.
Built robots using Arduino and ROS framework. Implemented robot kinematics algorithms.
Researched NLP applications using PyTorch and deep learning. Strong Python background.
Developed data pipelines with Hadoop and Spark. Worked with Scala for big data processing.
Gathered requirements, created UML diagrams, and supported system design using SQL.
Implemented SAP ERP solutions. Configured modules to improve business processes.
Created technical documents and API guides. Focused on clear communication.
Built cross-platform apps using Flutter and Dart. Integrated with Firebase backend.
Developed VR experiences in Unity with C#. Designed immersive 3D environments.
Created AR apps using ARCore and Unity. Integrated 3D objects for interactions.
Designed data models and architectures. Managed ETL and cloud-based databases.
Optimized websites for SEO. Conducted keyword research and tracked results in Analytics.
Resolved customer issues via CRM systems. Provided effective problem-solving support.
Advised clients on IT system design and cloud adoption. Strong business analysis skills.
Created operational reports using SQL and Excel. Worked on process optimization tasks.
